testcase.name: invalidGuessReturnsValidationFeedback
testcase.system-out:
22:52:23.978 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.techtechnicworld.number_guessing_game_system.NumberGuessingGameSystemApplicationTests]: NumberGuessingGameSystemApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:52:24.076 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.techtechnicworld.number_guessing_game_system.NumberGuessingGameSystemApplication for test class com.techtechnicworld.number_guessing_game_system.NumberGuessingGameSystemApplicationTests 22:52:24.140 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.techtechnicworld.number_guessing_game_system.NumberGuessingGameSystemApplicationTests]: NumberGuessingGameSystemApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:52:24.141 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.techtechnicworld.number_guessing_game_system.NumberGuessingGameSystemApplication for test class com.techtechnicworld.number_guessing_game_system.NumberGuessingGameSystemApplicationTests

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3
